title: Current-counted dry-compound obligation
summary: Track dry slick compound diversity within each race-driver sequence up to and including the current row.
rationale: Chronological dry-compound obligation features were repeatedly promising. Counting only prior compounds can miss the fact that the current row’s compound may already satisfy part of the dry-compound rule state.
implementation_hint: Temporarily sort by race context, driver, and lap. Within each sequence, track the set of observed slick compounds using only current and earlier rows, add current-counted slick diversity, remaining dry-compound debt, current compound is new, and late-race limited-diversity flags, then restore original row order.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium confidence; useful for late-race legal/strategy pressure.
risk: Sequence sorting must be stable and row-aligned; do not use future stint endpoints or future compounds.
